title: Art's Discipline
content:
Long since I came into the school of Art,
    A child in works, but not a child in heart.
    Slowly I learn, by her instruction mild,
    To be in works a man, in heart a child.
meaning:
"Art's Discipline" is a quintessential example of Robert Fuller Murray's signature style...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
